name: diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook.FitHook
content: The `FitHook` class in the `diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook` module is used to monitor the progress of a `FitRecipe` refinement. It can be used as a fithook for the `FitRecipe` class. The methods in this class are called during the preparation of the `FitRecipe` for refinement and during the residual call.

name: diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook.FitHook.reset
content: The `reset` method in the `FitHook` class of the `diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook` module is used to reset the hook data. It is called whenever the `_prepare` method of the `FitRecipe` class is invoked. This usually happens when there's a change in the fit hierarchy, such as adding a new `ParameterSet`, constraint, or restraint.

name: diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook.FitHook.precall
content: The `FitHook.precall` method in the `diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook` module is used within the `FitRecipe.residual` method, before the calculation process. It has an attribute 'recipe' which is an instance of the `FitRecipe` class.

name: diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook.FitHook.postcall
content: The `postcall` method in the `FitHook` class of `diffpy.srfit.fitbase.fithook` is used after the calculation within `FitRecipe.residual`. It has two attributes: `recipe`, which is the instance of `FitRecipe`, and `chiv`, which represents the residual vector.
